source_pr.title: planner/core: migrate test-infra to testify for prepare_test.go
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: tison <wander4096@gmail.com>

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #28394 

### Release note


symptoms: - c.Skip("exhaustive types test, skip race test")
failure_signature: - c.Skip("exhaustive types test, skip race test")
root_cause_explanation: This PR is a test-infra migration: it converts `planner/core/prepare_test.go` from gocheck to standard `testing` with `testify/require`, and updates testkit usage accordingly. The change is primarily about modernizing/standardizing the test framework rather than changing planner behavior, so it is classified as `test_infra_migration`.
fix_pattern: Migrate gocheck-based tests to `testing` + `testify/require`, and align testkit helpers/APIs with the new test framework.

evidence: evidence: - c.Skip("exhaustive types test, skip race test")
